title: Mama Luigi and the Unfitting Music ( Over Nine Thousand Toasters III )
description:
Mama Luigi is really bad at telling stories; hilarity ensues!  What can I say... I had a ton of fun coming up with the script for this one, enjoy!

As always, you can add &fmt=18 to the end of the url for stereo sound and higher video quality (and for this video it syncs the sound a bit better too).  There's a lot of unfitting music in this one too, so I highly recommend it:
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DrfsW9AiKUQ&fmt=18

I didn't want it to go over 10 minutes, so the credits are incomplete - stay tuned for "Mama Luigi and the Unfitting Music - The Alternate Credits"!

In the meantime, here are the REAL credits.


Made with:
Acid
Audacity
VideoSpin
Photoshop
Flash


Music:
(WARNING: spoilers ahead!)

"The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past" (Intro)
Soundtrack by Kōji Kondō

"Yeah"
Usher feat. Lil Jon & Ludacris

Lord of The Rings (Isengard theme)
Howard Shore

"Caramelldansen" (Speedycake Remix)
original by Caramell

"Yesterday"
The Beatles

"Chacarron Macarron"
El Chombo

"Chocolate Rain"
Original Song by Tay Zonday

"Never Gonna Give You Up"
Rick Astley

"Pillar of Salt"
by Star Salzman (OverClocked ReMix (www.ocremix.org))

"Super Mario Land 2 - Six Golden Coins" (Choose Your Pipe)
Soundtrack by Kazumi Totaka
